title: RELEASING.md references git push but repo has no remote
description: RELEASING.md lines 137-138 say 'git push origin v0.2.0'. The project CLAUDE.md explicitly states 'This repo has no git remote configured. git push is not possible.' The release docs will fail on step 5. Fix: remove or annotate the push step, and clarify the source-of-truth sync method (bd dolt push).
